content:
# Meta-Rule: Gradient Flow Optimization v56

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.79
AND tile_novelty > 0.64
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 5 automated workers
2. Explore frontier concepts
3. Generate 20 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 22.1% improvement in knowledge coverage
